from __future__ import annotations


class Counter:
    def __init__(self) -> None:
        self.value = 0

    def increment_and_render(self) -> str:
        self.value += 1
        return f"Count is now {self.value}"


def method_mutates_state_and_emits_user_facing_representation_positive() -> str:
    return Counter().increment_and_render()
